title: sys.log.entry v1
description: Normalized log entry from the log-normalizer adapter. Produced from Docker container logs, journald, application log files, kernel /dev/kmsg, or Redis slow-log. Lives only in nbus:logs Redis stream — never emitted on the bus.

service.description: Container name, systemd unit, app filename, 'kernel', or 'redis-slowlog'

raw.description: Original log line, UTF-8 decoded with replacement chars

parsed_fields.description: Source-specific fields: journald _SYSTEMD_UNIT/_PID, Docker container_name/image, kernel priority/seqnum, Redis command/duration_us
